# Maintainer context

signal-purple is an alpha-quality, unofficial Signal linked-device plugin for
libpurple 2, targeting Debian 13. Priorities are protocol correctness, safe
lifecycle boundaries, encrypted storage, honest compatibility claims, and a
low-support-burden user experience.

Do not claim live compatibility without dedicated-account evidence. Do not add
primary registration, calls, or backup compatibility opportunistically. Public
communication should be friendly, brief, and specific.
